'''Ittummi''' was a location on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] north of [[Chenachochan]]. It was occupied by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Berserker]]s which aided [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] destroy [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Hindane Darcc/Legends|Darcc]]'s [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]].

==Description==
Ittummi was an advanced [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. It was completely surrounded by [[Tree/Legends|the forest]]. The city included a [[Fortress/Legends|Fortress]] and a [[Command center]], and featured [[prefab shelter]]s and military buildings such as a [[Barracks/Legends|troop center]]. A [[food processing center]] sat in a small outlet to the south of the city.

==History==
Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the city was led by an [[Unidentified Wookiee Elder|Elder]] and had a large force of [[Berserker]]s.

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}}
During the battle to [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|liberate]] Kashyyyk from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Ittummi was visited by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] members [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], the latter of whom was a Wookiee. Chewbacca negotiated with the Elder, who agreed to turn over control of the Berserkers to Chewbacca's [[Army/Legends|army]]. The Berserkers assisted in the destruction of the Empire's [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Hindane Darcc/Legends|Darcc]]'s [[Darcc's Palace|Palace]].
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Ittummi was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The city appeared during a Chewbacca campaign mission, and visiting it to gain control of the Berserkers is a bonus objective. The mission and thus Ittummi appears in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''.
